title: Youtube Poop - What is Spaghetti?
description:
My third youtube poop. Thought I'd try some Mario Hotel material with this one and I really wanted to get What Is Love in one of these so I stuffed it in at the end. So watch the whole thing please. :)

Made using Adobe Premiere.

Music at the end:
Haddaway - What is Love
